name: Consensus
api_notes: The documented API is narrow, primarily exposing a quick search endpoint for research papers.
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community Model Context Protocol (MCP) server was found for Consensus.
blocker: The API access is gated behind an application and custom-quote process, and is not available via self-serve sign-up.
access_notes: Access is gated; the API is available by application only, requiring users to request access for a custom quote.
auth_notes: Authentication uses an API key (passed via the x-api-key header).
one_liner: Consensus is a research tool that provides an API for programmatically searching and retrieving peer-reviewed academic paper metadata and citations.

evidence.claim: The Consensus API is available by application only.
The API uses an x-api-key header for authentication.
Search citation: How to Access Consensus API Documentation
Search citation: What Is Consensus AI? 📚 Fast & Credible Research (Obsidian + Zotero)
